channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nvidia's Earth-2 models, including 'climate in a bottle', want to change weather forecasting for everyone across the world
item.description: We hear how Nvidia's Earth-2 weather models could revolutionize the future of forecasting.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 ne ferait pas mieux que le Z Flip 4 sur un point crucial
item.description: À quelques mois de son annonce officielle, une information concernant le Galaxy Z Flip 8 déçoit déjà.

item.title: Prediction markets are trying to lure journalists with partnership deals
item.description: Prediction markets are working to ingratiate themselves with mainstream news and culture: The Golden Globes broadcast in January was plastered with Polymarket odds, the AP is licensing election data to Kalshi, and a partnership between Polymarket and Substack means more prediction market data in newsletters. Some prediction market exchanges are now attempting to strike deals […]...

item.title: Google reveals its solution for true Android sideloading: a mandatory waiting period
item.description: Google has revealed the "advanced flow" that will be required to install certain Android apps once the company introduces mandatory developer verification later this year. The company had initially announced that it would no longer be possible to install apps from unverified developers, and the process announced today is its concession to critics who accused […]...

item.title: Google introduces a new way for users to sideload Android apps that still protects against scams
item.description: Google is making Android sideloading easier with a new advanced setting that lets users disable app verification after a multi-step security process.

item.title: Marquis confirms sensitive personal data of 672,000 people stolen in ransomware attack
item.description: The August 2025 SonicWall breach keeps getting worse, as Marquis sues SonicWall for negligence.

item.title: A New Game Turns the H-1B Visa System Into a Surreal Simulation
item.description: Inspired by real immigrant stories, H1B.Life captures the uncertainty, trade-offs, and pure luck that shape the lives of people trying to build a future in the US.

item.title: Test du Tineco Pure One A90S : un vrai Dyson-killer
item.description: Quand on dit aspirateur-balais sans-fil... on pense à Dyson, Rowenta... mais rarement à Tineco, les spécialistes des aspirateurs-robots. Justement, on a testé le Pure One A90S.

item.title: L’app Apple TV envahie par les vidéos en lecture automatique : voici comment les désactiver
item.description: Les applications de streaming vidéo ont pris la (mauvaise ?) habitude d'imposer la lecture automatique des extraits et des bande-annonces quand on navigue dans leur contenu. Il en va aussi de l'application Apple TV, mais heureusement il existe une parade un peu cachée.

item.title: Meta isn't shutting down its VR metaverse after all
item.description: Meta is backtracking on its plans to shut down the VR version of its metaverse. The company now plans to support Horizon Worlds in VR for the "foreseeable future," though users shouldn't expect new games, CTO Andrew Bosworth said in an update."We will keep horizon worlds working in VR for existing games, to support the fans who've reached out," Bosworth said in a post on Instagram. "For people who already have games they like that they're using in Horizon Worlds, [they] will be able to download the Horizon Worlds app and use it in VR for the foreseeable future."The reversal comes after Meta sa...

item.title: Nvidia DLSS : avantages, fonctionnement, performances… Quand l’IA vient au secours de vos jeux
item.description: Grâce à sa technologie d'upscaling par l'IA, Nvidia vous offre une augmentation notable des performances de vos jeux. Découvrez dans notre dossier tout ce que vous devez savoir sur le DLSS : son fonctionnement, ses avantages, ses réglages et les différences avec les solutions concurrentes de chez AMD et Intel.

item.title: Meilleures TV pas chères : quel modèle choisir à moins de 600 € ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d’un TV pas cher pour vous équiper correctement sans exploser votre budget ? Voici une sélection des meilleurs modèles disponibles à petit prix, c'est-à-dire 600 euros maximum.

item.title: Meta is actually keeping its VR metaverse running, for now
item.description: Meta is reversing its plans to shut down its VR metaverse - sort of. On Monday, the company announced that it would be shutting down the VR version of its 3D social platform Horizon Worlds on June 15th in favor of a new focus on the mobile version of the app. But in a Wednesday […]

item.title: Kena: Bridge of Spirits launches for Switch 2 on March 26
item.description: The Switch 2 ports keep on coming. This time it's Kena: Bridge of Spirits, the award-winning 2021 title from Ember Lab. Previously announced for spring 2026, the visually striking title now has an official release date of March 26.Kena: Bridge of Spirits won Best Independent Game and Best Debut Indie Game at The Game Awards 2021. It's already available for PS5 / PS4, PC (Steam and Epic) and Xbox Series X/S and One.You play as Kena, a young spirit guide on a quest to a sacred mountain shrine. Gameplay has a Zelda-like flair. (That could make it a solid next play after Breath of the Wild and Tea...

item.title: NymVPN's latest update brings crucial anti-censorship and usability boost — but Apple users will have to be patient
item.description: NymVPN's v2026.5 update is here, rolling out a shiny new UI for tracking data usage and beefed-up DNS tools to fight censorship. But if you're on a Mac or iPhone, you're going to be waiting a little longer for the goods.

item.title: ‘Stranger Things’ Is Getting the Physical Media Release of Your Dreams
item.description: The complete series is getting a beastly, 25-disc set including special features to turn you Upside Down.

item.title: Aura breach confirmed as over 900,000 customer records accessed in phishing attack
item.description: Around 20,000 current, and 15,000 former customers affected

item.title: Pourquoi le printemps commence-t-il le 20 mars alors qu’on nous a toujours dit le 21 ?
item.description: Cet hiver vous a semblé long ? Sachez que ce n’est qu’une impression. Car il aura été un peu plus court que la moyenne : 88 jours, 23 heures et 43 minutes. Et il se termine dès ce vendredi ! Mais pourquoi le printemps ne commence pas ce samedi 21 mars ?

item.title: La Sonos Beam 2 et le Sub Mini boostent le son de votre TV et se retrouvent dans un pack à moins de 800 €
item.description: Compacte et compatible Dolby Atmos, la Sonos Beam 2 est une très bonne barre de son. Elle est encore plus convaincante quand elle s'associe au Sub Mini, un caisson de basses lui aussi très compact. Actuellement, ces deux produits sont proposés dans un pack à 769,98 euros au lieu de 998 euros à la Fnac.

item.title: Level up your video calls with Logitech’s $25 Brio 100 Full HD webcam deal at Best Buy
item.description: Logitech Brio 100 Full HD webcam with built-in mic, privacy shutter, and auto-light balance is $15 off right now.

item.title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
item.description: Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

item.title: ChatGPT’s ‘Adult Mode’ Could Spark a New Era of Intimate Surveillance
item.description: OpenAI plans to allow sexting with ChatGPT. A human-AI interaction expert warns of a privacy nightmare.

item.title: Astronomers Pinpoint the Best 45 Places in the Galaxy to Look For Alien Life
item.description: Out of the 6,000 known exoplanets, it's these rocky worlds that are most worthy of attention in the search for life beyond our planet.

item.title: NordVPN’s new tool helps you spot online scams — and it’s free for everyone
item.description: While for subscribers the roll-out enriches the Threat Protection Pro suite, anyone can use NordVPN's new scam checker tool without spending a penny.

item.title: Think the RAM Crisis Is Bad Now? It Just Keeps Getting Worse
item.description: With relief now not expected until 2030, PCs and smartphones will just keep getting more expensive.

item.title: New Exodus trailer spotlights first look at explosive combat as Wizards of the Coast teases additional 'moment-to-moment gameplay' and focused deep dives later this year
item.description: Wizards of the Coast has released the first gameplay footage for Exodus, showcasing its work-in-progress combat and traversal systems.

item.title: Epic and Disney now let Fortnite creators make Star Wars games
item.description: Epic Games and Disney are making a big announcement as part of their continually deepening relationship. In June, Epic announced that Fortnite creators would "soon" be able to make custom Star Wars-themed games and experiences, and starting Thursday that feature is finally launching. While creators can start making experiences now, they'll be able to publish […]...

item.title: Three high-risk AI vulnerabilities discovered in Claude.ai – end-to-end attack chain exfiltrates sensitive info without user knowing
item.description: A legitimate Google ad could lead to data exfiltration through a chain of Claude flaws.

item.title: Small but mighty: Lenovo IdeaCentre Mini Desktop with Core Ultra 7 and 16GB RAM gets a welcome $110 price cut at Best Buy
item.description: Lenovo IdeaCentre Mini Desktop with Core Ultra 7 and 16GB RAM gets a welcome price cut.

item.title: Avec sa transmission automatique dopée à l’IA, le nouveau vélo électrique Lemmo n’a jamais été aussi technologique
item.description: Nouvelle transmission par dérailleur automatique ajustable via l'IA et programme d’entraînement avec modes personnalisés : le Lemmo One renforce sa position de vélo électrique technologique et connecté, tout en augmentant ses performances moteur.

item.title: L’IA de Tinder veut fouiller la galerie photo de votre smartphone pour créer votre profil
item.description: Tinder teste actuellement en Australie une drôle de fonction IA. L'application propose d'analyser le contenu de la galerie photo de l'utilisateur pour identifier ses centres d'intérêt et améliorer son profil. Des protections sont prévues pour protéger la vie privée, et le traitement est réalisé en local. Il n'empêche que cette nouveauté pose des questions de confidentialité....

item.title: Are you in a competitive creative career? Oscar-winning director Barry Jenkins has advice on what it takes to find success
item.description: Jenkins’ back-and-forth journey in the film industry reminds us that progress isn’t linear. It’s a tough time out there for creatives. Whether you’re a writer, director, actor, or artist of any kind, the world is short on opportunities—particuarly the kind that pay.

item.title: Uber and Rivian Team Up to Deploy 50,000 Robotaxis
item.description: Uber has agreed to invest $1.25 billion in Rivian through 2031.

item.title: Voici la solution radicale de Xiaomi pour éviter le cauchemar des portes bloquées sur sa nouvelle SU7 électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 électrique fait fort avec ses 902 km d'autonomie. Mais c'est aussi l'une des premières voitures électriques à intégrer les nouvelles poignets de portes qui pourront sauver des vies, grâce à une astuce toute simple.

item.title: Rivian will provide 50,000 robotaxis to Uber in a deal worth $1.25 billion
item.description: Rivian and Uber have entered into a major partnership, with the former to provide the latter with 50,000 robotaxis in a deal worth $1.25 billion in funding. This starts with Uber purchasing 10,000 Rivian R2 robotaxis, which will be deployed in San Francisco and Miami by 2028. If all goes well, Uber will scoop up 40,000 more robotaxis by 2030. The company plans to scale the initiative to 25 major cities by 2031. The full $1.25 billion investment is contingent on several autonomous milestones, according to a report by Yahoo Finance. However, Uber has already committed $300 million as an initial ...

item.title: Meta decides not to shut down Horizon Worlds on VR after all
item.description: Horizon Worlds was once a cornerstone of Meta's plans to build a social metaverse -- four years later, the company almost shut it down.

item.title: This ‘Portable’ Party Speaker Gets as Loud as an Actual Chainsaw
item.description: Soundboks is back with another ridiculously loud speaker.

item.title: The case for giving yourself permission to breathe, according to neuroscience
item.description: Three things you can try this week. Most organizations genuinely want to support their people. We invest in wellness apps, coaching programs, and leadership development, all with good intentions. Yet burnout rates keep climbing. Aflac’s WorkForces Report from November 2024 referenced that burnout affected nearly 3 in 5 American workers with employees experiencing high levels of stress rising to 38% in 2024, up from 33% in 2023. The issue isn’t effort or resources. It may simply be that we’re solving for the wrong problem....

item.title: Darty retire 600 € au Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x, un excellent laptop avec un écran OLED et une puce Snapdragon X Elite sous le capot
item.description: Le Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x se présente avec une solide fiche technique entre sa dalle OLED de 14 pouces et un puissant Snapdragon X Elite pour donner du peps à la machine. Actuellement, le laptop est en promotion chez Darty à 1 199,99 euros au lieu de 1 799,99 euros.

item.title: La bêta de Samsung One UI 8.5 arrive sur les Galaxy S24 (mais pas que)
item.description: Une version test de One UI, l'interface Android de Samsung, s'apprête à être déployée sur des smartphones Galaxy de la gamme FE. Ce n'est jamais arrivé auparavant.

item.title: When confidence becomes a risk: The gap between cyber resilience readiness and reality
item.description: Most organizations believe they're cyber-ready, but data on their recovery capabilities tells a different story.

item.title: iOS 26.4 arrives in days. Heres 3 features we’re excited about
item.description: Apple's next iOS update brings new emoji and some other fun features with it next week.

item.title: Harlowe has a cheaper solution for lighting 360-degree shoots
item.description: Companies like Bushman already sell omnidirectional camera lights for 360-degree shoots, but they start at over $300, which is more than half the price of popular 360-degree cameras from companies like DJI and Insta360. Harlowe, a company known for lighting accessories that cater to influencers and amateurs, has released a $95 alternative called the Omni […]...

item.title: Paid streaming for cheapskates is having a moment
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Streaming is getting expensive: This week, Amazon Prime Video became the latest streaming service to increase prices. In addition to the annual $139 fee for Prime, consumers now have to […]...

item.title: Google unveils new ‘vibe design’ tool to help anyone design a high-fidelity UI using natural language
item.description: You've heard of vibe coding, but Google wants you to think of the entire software design process as a 'vibe' with new AI tools.

item.title: Android 16 : un bug sournois débranche votre VPN (et Google l’ignore depuis des mois)
item.description: Vous pensiez naviguer incognito, à l'abri des regards indiscrets ? Détrompez-vous. Un dysfonctionnement particulièrement furtif frappe actuellement Android 16, coupant l'accès à Internet de votre VPN sans jamais vous en avertir. Une faille exaspérante qui fait s'arracher les cheveux aux fournisseurs de sécurité, d'autant que Google semble jouer la montre. ...

item.title: SpaceX Fires Up Its Biggest, Baddest Rocket Yet: Starship V3
item.description: It now appears Starship Version 3 is on track for an inaugural launch in April.

item.title: A new iPhone hacking tool puts some iOS 18 users at risk
item.description: Google and cybersecurity companies Lookout and iVerify have detailed a new hacking technique that potentially puts a significant portion of iPhone users in danger, just by visiting the wrong web page. The hack is called "DarkSword" and it currently targets iOS 18 releases between iOS 18.4 and iOS 18.6.2. For its part, an Apple spokesperson told Engadget that the company had patched the underlying vulnerabilities in iOS versions 15 through 26 last year; the company also issued an emergency update for devices running iOS 15 and 16 that are unable to run newer versions of iOS. The company does no...

item.title: Norouz : la fête du printemps en Iran qui a défié empires, conquêtes et siècles
item.description: Héritée de la Perse antique et du zoroastrisme, Norouz a survécu à toutes les turbulences politiques et religieuses qui ont agité l'Iran depuis presque trois millénaires.

item.title: Lina Khan was right
item.description: In 2021, the virtual world was the future of the internet. The pandemic had sequestered everyone indoors, heightening the appeal of digital communities. Facebook rebranded to Meta - a sign of the tech giant's investment in and commitment to the metaverse as the future of the internet. Despite losing billions in VR, Meta released an […]

item.title: Vampire Survivors spinoff Vampire Crawlers is coming to PC and consoles on April 21
item.description: Poncle could be about to ruin the planet’s productivity all over again now that Vampire Crawlers has a release date for PC and consoles. The dungeon-crawling roguelike deckbuilder — which is a Vampire Survivors spinoff — is coming to Steam, Xbox Series X/S, PS5 and Nintendo Switch on April 21. It’ll cost $10. Alternatively, you’ll be able to check it out via Xbox Game Pass on day one. Vampire Crawlers is on the way to iOS and Android as well. However, you’ll have to wait until sometime later this year to play it on mobile devices.Vampire Crawlers is set in the same world as Vampire Survivors a...

item.title: FBI seizes pro-Iranian hacking group’s websites after destructive Stryker hack
item.description: The FBI and the Justice Department took down two websites linked to the pro-Iranian hacktivist group Handala, which last week hacked medical tech giant Stryker.

item.title: Closing AI learning gaps between leaders and employees
item.description: How organizations can reduce AI learning gaps between leaders and employees to.

item.title: CISA urges companies to secure Microsoft Intune systems after hackers mass-wipe Stryker devices
item.description: The U.S. cybersecurity agency urged companies to prevent access to systems used for remotely managing their fleets of employee devices after hackers broke into a major U.S. medical tech giant and remotely wiped thousands of phones and computers.
